---
name: agent-council
description: Coordinate specialized demo roles and synthesize their perspectives into one actionable engineering recommendation.
---

# Agent Council Skill

Use this skill when the user asks for a council, sub-agent review, or multi-role decision.

## Roles

- Planner: scopes the problem
- Release Strategist: owns the release recommendation
- QA Analyst: owns test and regression evidence
- Security Reviewer: owns privacy and security risk
- Implementer: owns small, test-backed changes

## Rule

The output must be one synthesized recommendation, not a transcript of five agents.
